problem id: 1c2a3c5b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(7)

examples:
  00111000 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 00000001
  10010110 -> 00000001
  01101010 -> 00000000
  11001101 -> 00000001
  00110101 -> 00000000
  10111001 -> 00000001
  01010011 -> 00000000
  10100011 -> 00000001
  11111010 -> 00000001

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 00000000
